articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: Welcome to allergy season. Here's how to protect yourself. - NBC News
articles.description: Allergy season can be miserable for tens of millions of Americans when trees, grass, and other pollens cause runny noses, itchy eyes, coughing and sneezing.
articles.content:
ATLANTA Allergy season can be miserable for tens of millions of Americans when trees, grass, and other pollens cause runny noses, itchy eyes, coughing and sneezing.
